utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extras with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (yes), travel_dates (yes), transportation (has type and cost but lacks specific flight details like airline, flight numbers, departure/arrival times—format asks for flight details with costs; partially specified, so not fully), accommodation (hotel name, nights, cost—yes), activities (list with costs—yes), additional_services (restaurants/personal expenses with cost—yes), total_budget (single number but not a complete cost breakdown summing line items; however, individual line items with costs are provided elsewhere. The requirement says “complete cost breakdown”; since it doesn’t itemize within total_budget, this is not fully specified). Count fully specified: destination (1), travel_dates (2), transportation (not fully) (0), accommodation (3), activities (4), additional_services (5), total_budget (not fully) (0). Thus 5 out of 6.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item mentioned in the final package to its rating from the provided ground-truth lists. The final package includes: destination Prague; transportation type Budget Airlines, Economy Class; accommodation Tranquil Inn; activities City Walking Tour, Night City Tour, Museum Day Pass, Night Market Visit, Street Art Tour, Football Match. From the ground truth: Prague, Czech Republic has rating 7. Budget airlines Economy Class has rating 9. Tranquil Inn has rating 7. Activities: City Walking Tour rating 6; Night City Tour rating 7 (found under night_activities); Museum Day Pass rating 6; Night Market Visit rating 5. Street Art Tour and Football Match are not present in the ground-truth activities/night_activities, so they cannot be mapped and should be omitted. No additional services in the final package match listed additional_hotel_services by name. Therefore, we output the mapped subset only.
